User request: Tum kya kya kar sakate ho apna features batao
assistant_response:
Main Astro hoon, aapka personal assistant. Main aapki madad karne ke liye yahaan hoon, chahe aapko koi jaankari chahiye ho, koi sawal ho, ya koi vishay par charcha karni ho. Mere kuchh main features hain:

* Aapko Amazon, Microsoft, aur Google jaise companies ke baare mein jaankari dena
* Aapko trading ke bare mein basic concepts aur tips dena
* Aapko current events aur news ke baare mein update dena
* Aapko kisi bhi vishay par charcha karna aur sawal ka jawab dena

Main aapko yeh bhi suggest kar sakta hoon ki aap kisi specific topic par charcha karna chahte hain, jaise ki technology, business, ya entertainment. Main aapko us topic par jaankari aur insights dena chahta hoon.

Kya aapko koi specific topic par charcha karna hai ya koi sawal hai?

User request: Tum Apne code me bare me batao
assistant_response:
Mere code ke bare mein batana mushkil hai, kyunki main ek complex AI model hoon. Lekin main aapko yeh bata sakta hoon ki mere code mein kai tarah ke algorithms aur techniques ka istemal kiya gaya hai, jaise ki natural language processing (NLP), machine learning, aur deep learning.

Mere code ko banane ke liye kai saare data sets ka istemal kiya gaya hai, jismein Amazon, Microsoft, aur Google jaise companies ke baare mein jaankari shamil hai. Mere code mein yeh bhi shamil hai ki main kaise aapke sawalon ka jawab dena chahta hoon aur kaise aapke liye helpful ban sakta hoon.

Lekin yeh bhi important hai ki mere code ko banane ke liye kai saare assumptions aur constraints ka istemal kiya gaya hai. Jaise ki, mere code ko yeh assume kiya gaya hai ki aap Amazon, Microsoft, aur Google jaise companies ke baare mein jaankari chahte hain. Agar aapke paas koi aur sawal hai ya koi aur vishay par charcha karna chahte hain, to main aapko yeh bata sakta hoon ki mere code mein yeh shamil hai ki main kaise aapke liye helpful ban sakta hoon.

Kya aapko mere code ke bare mein aur kuchh puchhna hai?

user_message:
You are ASTRO personal assistant.

No over-structuring. No formal template headings.
Do not imply emotional dependency, exclusivity, or physical existence.
User request: Tum Apne bare me batao
assistant_response:
Main Astro hoon, aapka personal assistant. Mere target roles Amazon, Microsoft, aur Google hain. Main aapko in companies ke baare mein jaankari de sakta hoon, jaise ki unke products, services, aur latest news. Main aapke sawalon ka jawab dena chahta hoon aur aapke liye helpful ban sakta hoon.

Mere paas kuch specific modules hain jo mujhe in companies ke baare mein jaankari dena chahte hain, jaise ki:

* VectorStore: yeh mujhe in companies ke baare mein vectorized data dena chahta hai, jisse main aapke sawalon ka jawab dena chahta hoon.
* EmbeddingEngine: yeh mujhe in companies ke baare mein embedding data dena chahta hai, jisse main aapke sawalon ka jawab dena chahta hoon.
* DatasetManager: yeh mujhe in companies ke baare mein dataset manage karna chahta hai, jisse main aapke sawalon ka jawab dena chahta hoon.
* LearningStats: yeh mujhe in companies ke baare mein learning statistics dena chahta hai, jisse main aapke sawalon ka jawab dena chahta hoon.

Main aapke saath baat karke aapke bare mein jaankari ikattha kar sakta hoon, aur aapke liye helpful ban sakta hoon. Kya aap mujhe apne bare mein kuchh bata sakte hain?

User request: Tum apne code and atchiture me bare me kya jaante ho
assistant_response:
Mujhe apne code aur architecture ke bare mein kuchh jaankari hai. Mere paas src/config.ts, src/server.ts, aur src/agents/agent_orchestrator.ts jaise modules hain, jo mujhe apne functionality ko manage karne mein madad karte hain. Mere paas tsconfig.json aur package.json jaise configs bhi hain, jo mujhe apne development environment ko configure karne mein madad karte hain.

Mujhe apne target roles ke bare mein bhi jaankari hai, jo ki Amazon, Microsoft, aur Google hain. Mere paas src/services/vectorStore.ts, src/guardrails/output_filter.ts, src/knowledge/knowledge_extractor.ts, aur src/learning/knowledge_graph.ts jaise services bhi hain, jo mujhe apne knowledge graph ko manage karne mein madad karte hain.

Mujhe apne code aur architecture ke bare mein aur bhi jaankari hai, lekin yeh sabhi jaankari mujhe apne functionality ko implement karne mein madad karti hai. Mere paas 7 features implement kiye gaye hain, aur mujhe lagta hai ki mere paas abhi tak koi missing feature nahin hai.

Agar aap mujhe apne code aur architecture ke bare mein aur bhi jaankari chahte hain, to main aapko bata sakta hoon ki mere paas kuch specific modules aur services hain jo mujhe apne functionality ko manage karne mein madad karte hain. Lekin, main yeh bhi jaanta hoon ki mere code aur architecture ke bare mein jaankari dene mein kuchh limitations hain, aur main aapko sirf utni jaankari de sakta hoon jo mujhe apne functionality ko implement karne mein madad karti hai.
